ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "emp_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "annual_salary" TEXT /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "payroll_frequency" TEXT /* Payroll frequency (e.g., Weekly, Bi-Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "runmode" TEXT /* Run mode (e.g., Y, N) indicating whether the employee is active or not */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "nino" TEXT /* National insurance number of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nicategories" (
  "nicategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NI category */,
  "nicategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the NI category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the NI category */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the NI category */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the NI category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nicategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll_frequencies" (
  "payroll_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll frequency */,
  "payroll_frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the payroll frequency (e.g., Weekly, Bi-Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payroll frequency */,
  "pay_period" INTEGER /* Pay period for the payroll frequency (in days) */,
  "pay_date_offset" INTEGER /* Pay date offset for the payroll frequency (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_forms" (
  "tax_form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax form */,
  "nicategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NI category the tax form belongs to */,
  "tax_form_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax form (e.g., CA4139, CF383, CF380A) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax form */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the tax form is required for the NI category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_tax_details" (
  "employee_tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee tax detail */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "nicategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NI category */,
  "tax_form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax form */,
  "tax_code" TEXT /* Tax code for the employee */,
  "tax_free_allowance" TEXT /* Tax-free allowance for the employee */,
  "student_loan_deduction" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the employee is subject to student loan deductions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_tax_details_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_tax_details_tax_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_form_id") REFERENCES tax_forms ("tax_form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_tax_details_nicategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("nicategory_id") REFERENCES nicategories ("nicategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error message */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date the error occurred */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the error (e.g., Critical, Warning, Info) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Resolution status of the error (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id", "role_id")
)
